---
title: "Monoid"
date: "2026-06-25"
categories: 
  - Math > Abstract Algebra
---

# 1. Definition
A ***monoid*** $\langle M, \ast \rangle$ is a semigroup with an identity element. That is, $\langle M, \ast \rangle$ is a binary algebraic structure such that $\ast$ is associative and there exists an identity element.

---
# 2. Example
$\langle \mathbb{N}_0, + \rangle$ is a monoid.
